chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1404 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.5887/2019 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.5888/2019 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 27.09.2019 M/s Qurban Ali Malano and Shaukat Ayaz Awan, Advocates for petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Petitioners Rahim Bux, Waqar Raheem and Muhammad Saqib, present in Court, seek protective bail in call-up notices (Annexure B Page 29, Annexure B-1 Page 31 and Annexure B-2 Page 33) in inquiry initiated against Syed Khursheed Ahmed Shah, MNA and others. It is, inter alia, contended that petitioners are prepared to surrender before the Principal Seat, Karachi and ready to join the inquiry, but apprehend arrest at the hands of NAB today. Serious mala fide on the part of NAB is alleged by petitioners. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for a period of four days is granted to the petitioners subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,50,000/- (Rupees one lac fifty thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Petitioners are directed to surrender before learned concerned Court, in the aforesaid period and to join the inquiry forthwith. This order shall cease to effect after expiry of four days or whenever the petitioners surrender before the concerned Court, which one occurs earlier. In case, petitioners fail to surrender before the concerned Court in the aforesaid period, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to effect after expiry of four days or whenever the petitioners surrender before the concerned Court, which one occurs earlier. In case, petitioners fail to surrender before the concerned Court in the aforesaid period, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. Petition for protective bail is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
